narrative:
Green V (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,076 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.8 percentage points.
